name: panel
note: AGPL-3.0-only panel code (Copyright (C) 2026 coolwhite LLC) + MIT (Laravel + Filament). Built from docker/panel/Dockerfile. Verify runs the dedicated `ct:version` artisan command (Cycle 2 / v0.0.39); it prints `Cool Tunnel Panel <version>` from `panel/config/cool-tunnel.php::version`, and the matcher's soft version match asserts the pinned `version` field above is contained in that line. v0.0.34 introduced `php artisan --version` here (Laravel banner) but the framework version had no relationship to the panel's own — v0.0.35 silenced the probe to dodge a VersionMismatch flip; v0.0.37 declared the silencing honestly via `expect_no_version_line: true`; v0.0.39 finally restores real drift detection by giving the probe a panel-owned identity string.
